top_signals.title: Size matters: KNDS pitches long-barreled artillery for 60-kilometer base range

top_signals.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
top_signals.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: India's Telegram ban hit the UAE too. Here's how to get around it
top_signals.summary: India has banned Telegram until June 22 after the app was used to circulate leaked exam papers. CEO Pavel Durov accuses telecom Reliance of BGP hijacking that disrupted the app as far away as the UAE. Here's what happened, and how to get around the block with an MTProto proxy. [...]
